description: Long-form YouTube reference catalog — real content analysis from Azure GPT-4o-mini vision

editStyle.hook: Close-up of engine + hands working creates immediate intrigue
editStyle.musicSync: cuts aligned with music beats during high-energy moments

contentStructure.intro: 0-30s: Establishing shots of BMW M3 and parts

replicablePatterns: Close-ups to highlight details (hands on parts)
Hard cuts to maintain pacing and energy
Gradual increase in cut frequency as energy builds
Mix of wide and close-up shots for context + detail
longFormVideos.engagementMechanics: High-energy visuals + dynamic pacing + relatable content + music sync

editStyle.hook: Diamond pickaxe mining close-up + exciting structure reveal
editStyle.musicSync: cuts align with music beats during high-energy moments

replicablePatterns: Quick cuts between scenes to maintain interest
Text overlays to highlight key moments/items

longFormVideos.file: longer-reference-videos-for-youtube/World's Smallest TV  OT 30 - Dude Perfect (1080p, h264, youtube).mp4
longFormVideos.name: World's Smallest TV - Dude Perfect

editStyle.hook: Animated battle scene with vibrant visuals and high energy
editStyle.musicSync: cuts align with beats during gameplay

replicablePatterns: Mix of live action and animated content
longFormVideos.engagementMechanics: Visual spectacle + reaction shots + progressive challenge + humor

hookPatterns: Show the most exciting moment first (preview)
Close-up of action creates immediate intrigue
Text overlay with bold statement grabs attention
pacingPrinciples: Start slow (3-5s shots) → accelerate to 1-2s → peak at climax → taper
Cut frequency should mirror energy arc
Never stay at same pace for more than 30 seconds
transitionRules: Hard cuts for most transitions (maintains energy)
Dissolves only for section transitions (intro→body, body→outro)
No transitions during peak energy (cut only)
effectUsage: Text overlays for key information (not decoration)
Speed ramps for dramatic moments only
